sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_base64 (original String, encoded String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY original;
INSERT INTO test_base64 (original, encoded) VALUES ('clickhouse', base64Encode('clickhouse'));
UPDATE test_base64 SET encoded = base64Encode(original) WHERE original = 'clickhouse';
SELECT original, encoded FROM test_base64 WHERE encoded = base64Encode('clickhouse');
SELECT base64Encode('hello world') AS encoded_message, COUNT(*) FROM test_base64 GROUP BY encoded_message;
